description: Detects format string vulnerabilities in C: printf/fprintf/sprintf/snprintf/syslog/dprintf calls where format argument is a variable, not a string literal. Simplified from Rust: JSON version flags all call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name or check whether format argument is a literal without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify printf-family calls (printf, fprintf, sprintf, snprintf, syslog, dprintf) use string literals as the format argument to prevent format string injection
